candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Direct match to short-term debt/current portion of LTD; preferred clean total current debt line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Excludes leases appropriately but appears to be only one component, not the full short-term debt total.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Includes lease liabilities, which should be excluded in baseline STD.
Lease-related and explicitly excluded from baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Used the clean total current debt line from the shortlist. It is broader than the excluding-leases component and avoids summing components. Although a lease-excluding component exists, there is no separate short-term borrowings component visible to complete a non-lease sum.

candidates.why: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Includes non-current portion, so less precise than the short-term payable line.
Tax receivable asset, opposite of taxes payable.
Deferred tax liability, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because no TXP candidates were provided, but this is a clear direct balance-sheet match.

candidates.why: Best match for total/net PPE, which is preferred for PPEGT.
